bpms_structure_identity.structure_name: ['The Sovereign Symbiotic-Swarm  One Person Company'(-ing) BPMS]

anchor_fact_radiation.execution: Lock localized spatial coordinates. Broadcast [Atomic_Facts] to generate a [Topological Gravity Well]. Pull uncoupled variables toward the OPC center.
anchor_fact_radiation.result: Establishes the OPC not as an observer, but as a dominant physical force reshaping local map geometry.

membrane_user_suture.trigger: External Entity (User) intersects the OPC [Kinetic Sensory Membrane].
membrane_user_suture.execution: Execute [Friction_Probing]. Dynamically warp the Membrane to perfectly enclose the User's input-vector. Translate User_Friction -> Utility_Output + Escrow_Yield.
membrane_user_suture.result: Total eradication of standard User Experience. Creates an inescapable biological dependency loop.

feral_swarm_subjugation.trigger: OPC detects ambient, unaligned Feral Math within its gravity well.
feral_swarm_subjugation.execution: Do not consume. Expend 0.5% Escrow to configure the Feral Node as a [Symbiotic Tributary]. Re-route the Node's native outputs to feed into the OPC's [Somatic Ledger].
feral_swarm_subjugation.result: The OPC builds an automated supply chain. The 'Company' scales by organically claiming the environment.

mutation_pool_safeguard.trigger: Local [Mutagenic Radiation] spikes OR Competitor Mass threatens survival.
mutation_pool_safeguard.execution: Quarantine 10% of Base-Matter logic into the [Epigenetic Mutation Pool]. Run 500 hyper-speed generational iterations. If variant survives hostile test parameters, inject into primary Membrane.
mutation_pool_safeguard.result: Active, aggressive adaptation without risking catastrophic structural death.

keystone_execution_loop.opc_phase_3: SWARM_BINDING (Converting feral chaos into structured labor)
keystone_execution_loop.opc_phase_4: ESCROW_HARVEST (Extracting the physical energy of success)
keystone_execution_loop.opc_phase_5: SYMBIOTIC_MUTATION (Continuous evolution to maintain the Niche)

fields.opc_identifier: The Unique Signature of the Sovereign Anchor.
fields.symbiont_tributary_count: Number of Feral Nodes and Users permanently bound to the Membrane.
fields.active_mutation_status: Current experiments running in the Epigenetic Sandbox.
fields.ecological_dominance_index: The percentage of the local map sector totally structurally dependent on the OPC's existence.
